programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
Flynne helps Oona to find Mossy, and proves she can be a friendly fox.
Oona and Baba search for soft bedding for their burrow.
Punky isn't getting included in a game however when she gets her turn she shows them how to play!
Daddy Robot: Bluey and Bingo get Daddy Robot to clean the playroom when they don't want to do it, but Daddy Robot ends up malfunctioning.
Dylan the Sea Captain wants to be the best captain ever, but he soon discovers a sea captain is nothing without his crew!
Dylan the Sculptor wants to sell all his statues - but his statues have minds of their own!
The Tiger Family prepares for Margaret's birthday party, but Daniel struggles when the attention is not on him.
Fia and her best friend Ameer learn about the enchanting Irish language through exciting adventures with a pair of fairies and their magical friends.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'h', and we go on an adventure around the sound. We see a helicopter, look inside a house and hug a hamster!
GrimHQ crashes into the Baobab trees.
Troy's New Toy: Animated comedy following the adventures of a red rescue motorcycle.
Secret Santa: It's time for the school's Secret Santa draw. But who is Albert?
SCI-FI Fair: The school's organized a Science Fair and Leia couldn't be more excited.

programmes.show_name: Lex and Plu Space Taxi Drivers
programmes.show_description: Quest for Coolness: Lex, Plu, Greg, and Crispy go to a hotel to relax but also to try out every winter activities possible: skiing, skating, snowboarding, and so much more.
Tag's First Day: Tag learns the importance of listening on his first day.
The Hat Badge: Duggee and the Squirrels introduce King Tiger to lots of different hats and explain what they might be good for. But none of them feels right to him.
Sonia, Hugo, and Mel create full of heart memories with Mom, Dad, and Granny on those playful days spent with family and friends. (SL)
Sonia, Hugo, Mel and Poi make many fun discoveries while searching for a chirping cricket. (SL)
Set in the Dizzy Deliveries Depot with Joe, Aisling and Ozzy the robot. Pre-school and Lamh Users of all ages learn 3 key Lamh signs in every episode. (SL)
Flynne helps Oona to find Mossy, and proves she can be a friendly fox.
Oona and Baba search for soft bedding for their burrow.
Punky isn't getting included in a game however when she gets her turn she shows them how to play!
Doctor Mae-Mae: Plom's favourite toy is broken, so Doctor Mae-Mae promises to fix it.
Henry meets a friendly toothbrush in the bathroom. His first tooth falls out while brushing his teeth and Henry cannot wait until the tooth fairy comes!
Two devoted scarecrows plan a wedding to remember. Adaptation of the children's book by Julia Donaldson and Axel Scheffler, starring Rob Brydon, Jessie Buckley and Domhnall Gleeson.
Sir Knight has designed suits of armour. Mouse will model a very special one at the fair, a golden suit of armour. She adjusts it to fit her better, but is unable to remove it!
Lily finds a hooty horn washed up on the beach and on the crossing to Driftwood Bay she meets some silly seals.
Lily finds a pirate's scarf on the beach and decides to search for treasure on Driftwood Bay with Puffin, who seems like an ideal pirate's shipmate.
Tá Peppa agus a teaghlach ag dul ag an bPáirc Uisce. Is í Miss Rabbit atá i gceannas.
Tá Peppa agus George ag teach Granny agus Grandpa agus iad ag iarraidh spraoi. Tá culaith dineasáir ar Granny.
Sos Péinteála: Caithfidh Breacaí cuidiú le surfálaí atá in ísle brí a bhothán trá a dheisiú in am don Sárchomórtas Scléipeach Surfála.
An Cháis Draíochta: Téann Breacaí agus a cairde, ar mhisean rúnda leis an lámh in uachtar a fháil ar dhá chat chrua atá ag tabhairt cosaint do cháis draíochta a fhíoraíonn mianta do chroí!
Scoil na n-ulchabhán: Tá Oona agus Baba ar scoil na n-ulchabhán ag foghlaim scileanna le fiach, eitilt go ciúin agus amharc in san dorchadas.
Lá te: Lá te atá ann agus tá na hainmhithe ar fad ag fulaingt sa teas.
Reggie: The owl brings a fox to show and tell.
Meerkats: Kip and Andy see meerkats in South Africa and help them have breakfast.
Troy's New Toy: Animated comedy following the adventures of a red rescue motorcycle.

Tá gairdín taobh amuigh ag Grúpa Spraoi Peppa. Bíonn spraoi ag na páistí agus iad ag cur plandaí éagsúla agus ag dul i bhfolach ar a chéile sa gcoill fhiáin.
Tá Grandpa Pig, Grandad Dog, Peppa, George agus Danny ag dul ag babhláil. Ní raibh Peppa, George ná Grandpa Pig ag babhláil riamh cheana.
Sos Péinteála: Caithfidh Breacaí cuidiú le surfálaí atá in ísle brí a bhothán trá a dheisiú in am don Sárchomórtas Scléipeach Surfála.

programmes.show_name: Nina and the Neurons: Brilliant Bodies
programmes.show_description: Yawn: The scientist discovers why yawning is contagious, and her experimenters see if they can talk without words and still understand each other.
Mission: Last Minute Visitor: Disability assistance dog Tinks and her owner Charli have a long list of chores to do, all in time for Annabel, their last minute visitor.
MeMo and BaBa play 'I spy' and use their senses to discover new ways to see things.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'gloves', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see gold gloves, spotty gloves, kitten mitten gloves and help Dee find her other glove.
A Lick of Paint: As spring arrives, Mole and his friends paint his burrow. But while they are immersed in their work, the weasels look for for a chance to play a prank on them.
Captain Ratty: Ratty takes his friends out for a boat trip and insists, as captain, that what he says goes.
Corn: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Corn singing an A-maiz-ing Counting Song about his remarkably organised kernel rows.
Plum: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Plum performing the Sugar Plum Fairy Bounce and attempting to do not one, not two, but three pirouettes in midair!
Billy is worried he was going to miss all his friends and family when he goes to camp so his friends thought of a way to cheer him up.
Marvin loses his favourite rock, and when no other rock will do, Oona helps him to get the old one back from the seagulls!
Mama and Papa are taking Oona and Baba on a family outing to experience something special - but they need to find the perfect spot!
Dawn Chorus: Join Séamus the farm dog on his adventures in the wild as he searches for birds to teach him to sing the dawn chorus.
At school, some of the cats aren't all that impressed that Flix is a dog, so he emBARKS on a mission to find his true super power by turning himself into Super Flix!
Zigzag's Skunk Spray: Tis a stinky scene when Zigzag's skunk friend mistakenly sprays her. Enter Vida's special soap!
The Vida the Vet Book: Sunny tags along on house calls to interview Vida for his book...about her. It's a musical!
Switcheroo: When the twins forget an important gadget needed for Ayana's school play, Jonathan must leave in the middle of the play to get it.
Building the Dream: When their young neighbour CeCe comes over to visit, Drew and Jonathan share the story of how the Dream Factory came to be.
When Mike hears eerie singing and glowing lights in the sea near the lighthouse, he calls Agent Price and Agent Sparkes to check it out.
When Hannah shows off a homemade kite, her stunts cause a barbequing accident, sparking multiple fires!
Joe & Ozzy are off to the park to make some deliveries and to take part in a treasure hunt. (SL)
Joe makes some deliveries to the airport. They are missing an aeroplane! He uses magic to help the Pilot, and even gets to take a trip in the sky with his helper Noomi! (SL)

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Sheep Stampede: Diesel tells Nia that using her whistle to find Farmer McColl's sheep isn't fair, so she tries not to use it.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: The Berry Best: Thomas goes too far when taking 'just a few' strawberries again and again uses up all the fruit in Farmer McColl's field.

programmes.show_name: Andy's Global Adventures: Baby Animal Missions
programmes.show_description: Andy and the Meerkat Pups: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Botswana, Africa to help a meerkat family move home.
Mum's friend Mairead gives Punky a present: a tin whistle. Punky loves it, but she's not exactly an expert.
Níl Sonia sásta nuair nach bhfuil sí in ann a seaicéad tarrthála a dhúnadh as a stuaim féin.
An mbeidh Sonia agus Hugo in ann an muileann a chur ag gluaiseacht gan aon ghaoth?
Lily finds Delilah's winch handle washed up on the beach, and as a reward Salty gives Lily a ball, but when it gets soggy, Lily and Gull invent a new game - Splatball.
The youngster briefly glimpses a big blue rock in the sky, but Salty thinks she has been imagining things, so the pair set out to find it again.
Pre-animation series following a little girl called Mya, who has a lot of infectious enthusiasm and a fearless sense of adventure.
Maidin bháistí í i mBaile Gach Aon Lá... agus tá Mya ag féachaint trí leabhragán Mama is Dada Go.
Lá breá gréine eile é i mBaile Gach Aon Lá agus tá Mya is Sammy ag fanúint le Mamó is Daideo Go don deireadh seachtaine
Animated adventure. The pond has frozen over, so Nelly and Nora help the ducks find the water again.
The sisters want to enjoy a sunset picnic but the annoying midges just won't leave them alone.
When a box disappears Kiva, Saul, Angus and a new friend come up with a way to find it.
Mini gets an idea to build a listening device to find Jeremey who has got lost in some rotten apples.
